title: Bhuna Silky Mackerel Stir-fry
description: This kid-friendly British dish combines earthy flavors with a silky texture to make a delicious and nutritious meal featuring mackerel, bhuna spices, and halal-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 4 oz (115g) boneless mackerel fillets
ingredients.notes: Halal-certified and cooked to a minimum internal temperature of 63°C (145°F)

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup (60g) fresh spinach leaves
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste based on preference

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp asafoetida (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a subtle flavor boost, use 1-2 pinches

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Pat mackerel fillets dry with paper towels.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until soft.
Add mackerel fillets skin-side down. Sear them on both sides until golden brown (about 4-5 minutes per side).
Stir in cumin, turmeric, asafoetida if using, and lemon juice. Cook for an additional minute to combine flavors.
Pour coconut milk over mackerel fillets, cover with a lid or aluminum foil, and transfer to the preheated oven. Bake for about 15 minutes until the liquid is absorbed and the fish flakes easily.
Garnish with spinach leaves before serving. Serve hot as a main course.
